title: Stars Atlas Overrides
description: Manual overrides for excluding repositories from the generated catalog and forcing category assignments for specific repositories.

$schema.description: Relative path to this schema file so editors can validate config/overrides.json.

exclude.description: Repositories to remove entirely from categorization and generated data output.

categories.description: Manual category overrides. The first matching rule pins a repository to the given category.

categoryId.description: Valid category id defined in config/categories.json.

repoMatchRule.title: Repository Match Rule
repoMatchRule.description: Matches a repository by one or more exact identifiers. If more than one field is provided, all provided fields must match the same repository.

fullName.description: Repository full name in owner/repo format, for example vercel/next.js.

name.description: Repository name only, without the owner part, for example next.js.

url.description: Canonical GitHub repository URL, for example https://github.com/vercel/next.js.

categoryOverrideRule.title: Category Override Rule
categoryOverrideRule.description: Pins matching repositories to a specific category id.

match.description: Repository selector used to find the repository that should be overridden.

category.description: Category id that will always be assigned when the match rule succeeds.
